calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Mohammad Azizi, individually and dba Beach City Cleaners.
Default was entered against defendant on September 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 11, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mohammad Azizi, individually and dba Beach City Cleaners, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,648.13.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,705.20.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $4,917.90, for a total judgment in the amount of $41,771.23.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Application And Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Doublas A. Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bank of the West

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bank of the West's Application for writ of possession is granted. Bond is waived pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 515.010(b); defendant shall post a bond in the sum of $15,000.00 to avoid levy. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
